A Pride of Lions Pinyin A Pride of Lions 狮群 a pride of lions 狮群 狮群 pride of lions What Is a Pride? It is hot in Africa. Tall grasses wave. What is hiding? It’s a pride of lions! Their fur matches the color of the grass. 什么是狮群？ 非洲很热。高高的草在风里摇来摇去。草丛里藏着什么？是一群狮子！它们的毛色和草很像。 what is a pride 什么是狮群 it is hot 天气很热 in africa 在非洲 tall grasses 高高的草 wave 摇来摇去 what is hiding 藏着什么 it’s a pride of lions 是一群狮子 their fur 它们的毛色 matches 很像 the color of the grass 草的颜色 什么是 what is 狮群 a pride of lions 非洲 Africa 很热 is very hot 高高的草 tall grass 在风里 in the wind 摇来摇去 sways back and forth 草丛里 in the grass 藏着 is hiding 什么 what 是一群狮子 it is a pride of lions 它们的毛色 their fur color 和草很像 looks a lot like the grass About 15 to 40 lions live together. The group is called a pride. Most are females and cubs. Up to three grown males live with them. 大约15到40只狮子生活在一起。这样的群体叫狮群。大多数成员是母狮和幼狮。最多会有三只成年公狮跟它们一起生活。 about 15 to 40 lions 大约15到40只狮子 live together 生活在一起 the group 这样的群体 is called 叫作 a pride 狮群 most 大多数成员 are 是 females and cubs 母狮和幼狮 up to three grown males 最多三只成年公狮 live with them 和它们一起生活 大约15到40只狮子 about 15 to 40 lions 生活在一起 live together 这样的群体 this kind of group 叫 is called 狮群 a pride 大多数成员 most members 是 are 母狮和幼狮 female lions and cubs 最多会有三只成年公狮 up to three adult male lions 跟它们一起生活 live with them A pride lives and hunts in the same area. This is called a territory. Males protect this area. Females hunt there. Cubs play. They learn to hunt too. 一个狮群会在同一片地方生活和捕猎。这里就是它们的领地。公狮保护领地。母狮在这里捕猎。幼狮在这里玩耍，也学习捕猎。 a pride 一个狮群 lives and hunts 生活和捕猎 in the same area 在同一片地方 this 这片地方 is called 叫作 a territory 领地 males 公狮 protect 保护 this area 这片地方 females 母狮 hunt there 在那里捕猎 cubs 幼狮 play 玩耍 they 它们 learn to hunt 学习捕猎 too 也 一个狮群 a pride 会在同一片地方生活和捕猎 lives and hunts in the same area 这里 this place 就是 is 它们的领地 their territory 公狮 male lions 保护领地 protect the territory 母狮 female lions 在这里捕猎 hunt here 幼狮 cubs 在这里玩耍 play here 也学习捕猎 also learn to hunt Lion Cubs Grow. It’s time to give birth! A female leaves the pride. She hides in a den. She has two or three cubs. They leave the den in five weeks. 幼狮长大了. 要生小狮子了！一只母狮离开狮群，躲进洞穴。它会生下两三只幼狮。五周后，幼狮就会离开洞穴。 lion cubs grow 幼狮长大 it’s time to give birth 到生小狮子的时候了 a female 一只母狮 leaves 离开 the pride 狮群 she 它 hides 躲藏 in a den 在洞穴里 she 它 has 生下 two or three cubs 两三只幼狮 they 它们 leave 离开 the den 洞穴 in five weeks 五周后 幼狮 lion cubs 长大了 grow up 要生小狮子了 it is time to have baby lions 一只母狮 a female lion 离开狮群 leaves the pride 躲进洞穴 hides in a den 它会生下 it will give birth to 两三只幼狮 two or three cubs 五周后 after five weeks 幼狮 the cubs 就会离开洞穴 will leave the den Female cubs stay with the pride. By age 2, males leave. They look for a new territory. Some try to join another pride. They fight the pride’s males for a spot. 雌性幼狮会留在狮群里。雄性幼狮到了2岁左右就会离开。它们寻找新的领地。有些会试着加入另一个狮群。为了能留下来，它们会和那个狮群里的公狮打斗。 female cubs 雌性幼狮 stay with 留在 the pride 狮群里 by age 2 到了2岁左右 males 雄性幼狮 leave 离开 they 它们 look for 寻找 a new territory 新的领地 some 有些 try to join 试着加入 another pride 另一个狮群 they 它们 fight 打斗 the pride’s males 那个狮群里的公狮 for a spot 为了一个留下来的位置 雌性幼狮 female cubs 会留在狮群里 will stay in the pride 雄性幼狮 male cubs 到了2岁左右 when they are about 2 years old 就会离开 will leave 它们 they 寻找新的领地 look for a new territory 有些 some 会试着 will try to 加入另一个狮群 join another pride 为了能留下来 so they can stay 它们 they 会和那个狮群里的公狮打斗 fight with the male lions in that pride On the Hunt! Lions eat other large mammals. Females hunt together. They watch and listen for prey. They sneak up on the prey to get close. 捕猎时刻! 狮子会捕食其他大型哺乳动物。母狮会一起捕猎。它们看、听，寻找猎物。找到后，它们悄悄靠近。 on the hunt 捕猎时刻 lions 狮子 eat 吃 other large mammals 其他大型哺乳动物 females 母狮 hunt together 一起捕猎 they 它们 watch and listen for prey 看和听来寻找猎物 they 它们 sneak up on the prey 悄悄靠近猎物 to get close 为了靠近 捕猎时刻 hunting time 狮子 lions 会捕食 hunt and eat 其他大型哺乳动物 other large mammals 母狮 female lions 会一起捕猎 hunt together 它们 they 看听 watch and listen 寻找猎物 look for prey 找到后 after they find it 它们 they 悄悄靠近 quietly get close Females run fast toward prey. Their legs are strong. Big paws catch the prey. They tear the meat with sharp teeth. Males eat first. Females and cubs eat last. 母狮飞快地冲向猎物。它们的腿很有力。大大的爪子抓住猎物。锋利的牙齿把肉撕开。公狮先吃。母狮和幼狮最后吃。 females 母狮 run fast 飞快地跑 toward prey 冲向猎物 their legs 它们的腿 are strong 很有力 big paws 大大的爪子 catch 抓住 the prey 猎物 they 它们 tear 撕开 the meat 肉 with sharp teeth 用锋利的牙齿 males 公狮 eat first 先吃 females and cubs 母狮和幼狮 eat last 最后吃 母狮 female lions 飞快地冲向猎物 rush quickly toward prey 它们的腿 their legs 很有力 are very strong 大大的爪子 big paws 抓住猎物 catch the prey 锋利的牙齿 sharp teeth 把肉撕开 tear the meat open 公狮 male lions 先吃 eat first 母狮和幼狮 female lions and cubs 最后吃 eat last Lion Talk. Roar! Lions roar to find each other. They also roar when danger is near. They show their sharp teeth and claws too. They scare away lions from other prides. 狮子怎样交流。 吼！狮子用吼声寻找彼此。危险靠近时，它们也会吼叫。它们还会露出锋利的牙齿和爪子，把其他狮群的狮子吓走。 lion talk 狮子怎样交流 roar 吼 lions 狮子 roar 吼叫 to find each other 为了找到彼此 they 它们 also roar 也会吼叫 when danger is near 当危险靠近时 they 它们 show 露出 their sharp teeth and claws 它们锋利的牙齿和爪子 too 也 they 它们 scare away 吓走 lions from other prides 其他狮群的狮子 狮子 lions 怎样交流 how they communicate 吼 roar 狮子 lions 用吼声 use roaring sounds 寻找彼此 to find each other 危险靠近时 when danger comes near 它们 they 也会吼叫 also roar 它们 they 还会露出 also show 锋利的牙齿和爪子 sharp teeth and claws 把其他狮群的狮子吓走 scare away lions from other prides Lions make other sounds. They growl when angry or nervous. Lions may swat or bite at others. This shows they are not happy. They huff and purr when relaxed. 狮子还会发出别的声音。生气或紧张时，它们会低吼。狮子可能会拍打别的狮子，或张嘴咬过去，表示它们不开心。放松时，它们会轻轻喷气，也会发出呼噜声。 lions 狮子 make 发出 other sounds 别的声音 they 它们 growl 低吼 when angry or nervous 当生气或紧张时 lions 狮子 may 可能会 swat or bite at 拍打或咬向 others 其他狮子 this 这 shows 表示 they are not happy 它们不开心 they 它们 huff and purr 轻轻喷气并发出呼噜声 when relaxed 当放松时 狮子 lions 还会发出 also make 别的声音 other sounds 生气或紧张时 when angry or nervous 它们 they 会低吼 growl 狮子 lions 可能会 may 拍打别的狮子 swat other lions 或 or 张嘴咬过去 open their mouths and bite toward them 表示 it shows 它们 they 不开心 are not happy 放松时 when relaxed 它们 they 会轻轻喷气 gently huff 也会发出呼噜声 also make purring sounds What is this picture? 这张照片是什么？ lion cubs 幼狮 male lions 公狮 a pride 狮群 territory 领地 What is this picture? 这张照片是什么？ cub 幼崽 male 雄性 female 雌性 prey 猎物 What is this picture? 这张照片是什么？ den 洞穴 prey 猎物 territory 领地 pride 狮群 Click the picture. Listen to the question. 点击图片。听这个问题。 play with cubs 和幼狮玩耍 roar loudly 大声吼叫 hunt prey 捕猎猎物 fight with male lions 和公狮打斗 Click the picture. Listen to the question. 点击图片。听这个问题。 female lions 母狮 cubs 幼狮 male lions 公狮 they all eat 它们都吃 Complete the sentence! 完成句子！ Female cubs stay . 小母狮会 。 in the den 在洞穴里 with other cubs 和其他幼狮一起 with male lions 和公狮一起 with the pride 留在狮群里 Complete the sentence! 完成句子！ Lions eat . 狮子吃 。 tall grasses 高高的草 mammals 哺乳动物 fruits 水果 cubs 幼狮 Complete the sentence! 完成句子！ Cubs leave the den after . 幼狮在 后离开洞穴。 one week 一周 five months 五个月 five weeks 五周 five days 五天 Retell the story! 重述故事！ Read out loud! 大声读出来！ What is hiding? It's a pride of lions! Their fur matches the color of the grass. About 15 to 40 lions live together. The group is called a pride. Most are females and cubs. Up to three grown males live with them. 什么东西藏在那里？ 是一群狮子！ 它们的毛和草的颜色很像。 大约 15 到 40 只狮子生活在一起。|这个群体叫作狮群。 大多数是母狮和幼狮。 最多有三只成年公狮和它们生活在一起。 Record your answer. 记录你的答案。 Write a sentence about this picture. 写一句关于这张照片。 Write your answer. 写你的答案。 What are two things lions do in their territory? 狮子在自己的领地里做哪两件事？ Write your answer. 写你的答案。 What did you like about the story? What did you like about the story? Match the words! 匹配单词！ a pride 狮群 cubs 幼狮 male 雄性 prey 猎物 territory 领地 female 雌性 A Pride of Lions 狮群
Author: Author: Amy Korteum Amy Korteum
Translator: Translator: Dr. Rose Marie Garcia Fontana Dr. Rose Marie Garcia Fontana
